누가복음 24:1.content: But on the first day of the week, at early dawn, they and some others came to the tomb, bringing the spices which they had prepared.

누가복음 24:2.content: They found the stone rolled away from the tomb.

누가복음 24:3.content: They entered in, and didn’t find the Lord Jesus’ body.

누가복음 24:4.content: While they were greatly perplexed about this, behold, two men stood by them in dazzling clothing.

누가복음 24:5.content: Becoming terrified, they bowed their faces down to the earth. They said to them, “Why do you seek the living among the dead?

누가복음 24:6.content: He isn’t here, but is risen. Remember what he told you when he was still in Galilee,

누가복음 24:7.content: saying that the Son of Man must be delivered up into the hands of sinful men and be crucified, and the third day rise again?”

누가복음 24:9.content: returned from the tomb, and told all these things to the eleven and to all the rest.

누가복음 24:10.content: Now they were Mary Magdalene, Joanna, and Mary the mother of James. The other women with them told these things to the apostles.

누가복음 24:11.content: These words seemed to them to be nonsense, and they didn’t believe them.

누가복음 24:12.content: But Peter got up and ran to the tomb. Stooping and looking in, he saw the strips of linen lying by themselves, and he departed to his home, wondering what had happened.

누가복음 24:13.content: Behold, two of them were going that very day to a village named Emmaus, which was sixty stadia from Jerusalem.

누가복음 24:14.content: They talked with each other about all of these things which had happened.

누가복음 24:15.content: While they talked and questioned together, Jesus himself came near, and went with them.

누가복음 24:16.content: But their eyes were kept from recognizing him.

누가복음 24:17.content: He said to them, “What are you talking about as you walk, and are sad?”

누가복음 24:18.content: One of them, named Cleopas, answered him, “Are you the only stranger in Jerusalem who doesn’t know the things which have happened there in these days?”

누가복음 24:19.content: He said to them, “What things?” They said to him, “The things concerning Jesus, the Nazarene, who was a prophet mighty in deed and word before God and all the people;

누가복음 24:20.content: and how the chief priests and our rulers delivered him up to be condemned to death, and crucified him.

누가복음 24:21.content: But we were hoping that it was he who would redeem Israel. Yes, and besides all this, it is now the third day since these things happened.

누가복음 24:22.content: Also, certain women of our company amazed us, having arrived early at the tomb;

누가복음 24:23.content: and when they didn’t find his body, they came saying that they had also seen a vision of angels, who said that he was alive.

누가복음 24:24.content: Some of us went to the tomb, and found it just like the women had said, but they didn’t see him.”

누가복음 24:25.content: He said to them, “Foolish men, and slow of heart to believe in all that the prophets have spoken!

누가복음 24:26.content: Didn’t the Christ have to suffer these things and to enter into his glory?”

누가복음 24:27.content: Beginning from Moses and from all the prophets, he explained to them in all the Scriptures the things concerning himself.

누가복음 24:28.content: They came near to the village where they were going, and he acted like he would go further.

누가복음 24:29.content: They urged him, saying, “Stay with us, for it is almost evening, and the day is almost over.” He went in to stay with them.

누가복음 24:30.content: When he had sat down at the table with them, he took the bread and gave thanks. Breaking it, he gave it to them.

누가복음 24:31.content: Their eyes were opened and they recognized him, then he vanished out of their sight.

누가복음 24:32.content: They said to one another, “Weren’t our hearts burning within us, while he spoke to us along the way, and while he opened the Scriptures to us?”

누가복음 24:33.content: They rose up that very hour, returned to Jerusalem, and found the eleven gathered together, and those who were with them,

누가복음 24:34.content: saying, “The Lord is risen indeed, and has appeared to Simon!”

누가복음 24:35.content: They related the things that happened along the way, and how he was recognized by them in the breaking of the bread.

누가복음 24:36.content: As they said these things, Jesus himself stood among them, and said to them, “Peace be to you.”

누가복음 24:37.content: But they were terrified and filled with fear, and supposed that they had seen a spirit.

누가복음 24:38.content: He said to them, “Why are you troubled? Why do doubts arise in your hearts?

누가복음 24:39.content: See my hands and my feet, that it is truly me. Touch me and see, for a spirit doesn’t have flesh and bones, as you see that I have.”

누가복음 24:40.content: When he had said this, he showed them his hands and his feet.

누가복음 24:41.content: While they still didn’t believe for joy, and wondered, he said to them, “Do you have anything here to eat?”

누가복음 24:42.content: They gave him a piece of a broiled fish and some honeycomb.

누가복음 24:43.content: He took them, and ate in front of them.

누가복음 24:44.content: He said to them, “This is what I told you, while I was still with you, that all things which are written in the law of Moses, the prophets, and the psalms, concerning me must be fulfilled.”

누가복음 24:45.content: Then he opened their minds, that they might understand the Scriptures.

누가복음 24:46.content: He said to them, “Thus it is written, and thus it was necessary for the Christ to suffer and to rise from the dead the third day,

누가복음 24:47.content: and that repentance and remission of sins should be preached in his name to all the nations, beginning at Jerusalem.

누가복음 24:48.content: You are witnesses of these things.

누가복음 24:49.content: Behold, I send out the promise of my Father on you. But wait in the city of Jerusalem until you are clothed with power from on high.”

누가복음 24:50.content: He led them out as far as Bethany, and he lifted up his hands, and blessed them.

누가복음 24:51.content: While he blessed them, he withdrew from them, and was carried up into heaven.

누가복음 24:52.content: They worshiped him, and returned to Jerusalem with great joy,

누가복음 24:53.content: and were continually in the temple, praising and blessing God. Amen.
